elements.original_description: A cartoon figure of a person looking stressed, surrounded by floating question marks and a large red exclamation mark above their head. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist cartoon icon of a person looking stressed, with a worried expression, surrounded by floating question marks and a large red exclamation mark above their head, on a pure white background, clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks, conveying a tone of problem or confusion through composition and elements.
